title: Mekanism: Beyond
body:
# Mekanism Beyond

Mekanism Beyond is a high-tech addon for the Mekanism mod, designed to extend technological progression into the extreme late-game. It introduces massive multiblock structures, advanced nuclear physics, and a superior energy tier to handle the demands of ultimate-scale automation.

## Features

### Advanced Multiblocks
* **The Transmuter**: A colossal 17x18x17 structure designed for high-energy material conversion. By utilizing electromagnetic coils and supercharged components, it can process fluids and chemicals into rare isotopes like Uranium Water and Heavy Water.
* **Advanced Fusion Reactor**: An upgraded deuterium-based fusion system. It is capable of much higher injection rates than the standard reactor and serves as a primary source for high-flux neutron production.
* **p-B11 Aneutronic Fusion Reactor**: The pinnacle of power generation. By fusing Protons and Boron-11, this reactor utilizes direct energy conversion to produce massive amounts of Beyond Energy without the need for steam turbines.

### Beyond Energy (BE)
Mekanism Beyond introduces a new energy unit: **Beyond Energy (BE)**. 
* 1 BE is equivalent to 1,000,000,000 FE.
* This unit is used to manage the extreme power requirements and outputs of the mod's late-game machinery while keeping the numbers readable and efficient.

## Alpha Status and Development
This mod is currently in **Alpha**. 
* Many features are still being added, and existing mechanics are subject to significant balance changes.
* As an Alpha release, bugs and stability issues may be present. 
* It is strongly recommended to back up your world before updating or installing this mod.
* Feedback and bug reports are welcome as development continues toward a stable release.

## Dependencies
* Mekanism
* Mekanism Generators

## License and Credits
Mekanism Beyond is licensed under the MIT License.

This mod is an addon for Mekanism. Special thanks to Aidan C. Brady and the Mekanism team for the original mod and its open-source foundation. All rights to original Mekanism assets and code concepts belong to their respective authors.
